title: [cross-impl] pending_drop_tail reentrancy not modeled in Python/Rust
description: Zephyr adapter.c:305 documents non-atomic tail-update/memset/decrement and interrupt context requirement (from hhcn fix in 31def34ba). Python sim/medium.py:17 and Rust tx_queue.rs use different queuing without matching reentrancy guards or race simulation. Same logical queue-drop algorithm produces observably different behavior under concurrency. Add cross-impl test or unified queue primitive. See lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c:302 and spec for TDMA/pending semantics.
